case_title: JESSE LE VS. LEE BRICE GOMES

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $65.00) SERVED JUL-16-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GOMES, LEE BRICE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-27-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-27-2018 BY PRO TEM GREG GROENEVELD. 506 PLAINTIFF JESSE LE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LEE BRICE GOMES IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: GREG GROENEVELD; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-01-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-27-2018 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LE, JESSE AS TO DEFENDANT GOMES, LEE BRICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-27-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LE, JESSE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOMES, LEE BRICE $5,061.52 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,201.52 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GOMES, LEE BRICE
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY LE, JESSE GOMES, LEE BRICE
